amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 12,480 in Computers & Accessories (See Top 100 in Computers & Accessories) 698 in Inkjet Printer Ink Cartridges

features: Compatible Printers: 953xl ink cartridges multipack with the Newest Chip are perfectly compatible with hp officejet pro 7720 7740 ink cartridges, also suitable for hp officejet pro 8710 ink cartridges and 8720 7730 8715 8718 8719 8210 8725 8218 8728 8730 8740 printers

Remanufactured Ink with Latest Chips: The Palmtree 953xl ink cartridges are all Remanufactured components with the Latest Chip. They allow for simple and fast cartridge replacement, reduce printer errors and failures, and matching the performance of original cartridges

Outstanding Performance: The 4 pack 953XL ink cartridges for HP 953xl ink cartridges, comprising 1×953XL Black, 1×953XL Cyan, 1×953XL Yellow, and 1×953XL Magenta. Each colour delivers rich and vibrant prints, thus enhancing the neat appearance of your documents and ensuring optimal printing results

Extra-Large Capacity: 953XL black ink cartridge can print 2,000 pages, whilst each 953XL colour ink cartridge can print 1,600 pages (A4 at 5% coverage). These extra-large capacity 953 ink cartridges will not dry out and are designed to last, saving you both time and money

Tips: Due to the specialised upgrade nature of the printers compatible with this cartridge, to reduce the frequency of cartridge replacements and minimise damage to the printer, please follow the steps shown in pictures for installation and setup
